# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Trade only what the market has already proven. Enter at confirmed troughs (factual) rather than peaks, and exit at confirmed peaks (factual). 
- User prefers using indicators like EMA 9/21, RSI, and ADX (via finta) to confirm these trough-based entries. Quantum signals (EMA, RSI, ADX) are only useful when built on top of confirmed peak/trough structure. 
- Stop-losses should not be traditional; only goal-engine based exits are acceptable. 
- Predictions are fantasy; confirmations are fact. Everything else is illusion.
